headline: GE Vernova Expands German Wind Deals As Valuation And Momentum Diverge
summary: GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) has agreed new wind turbine supply deals in Germany with BBWind and Greenvolt Power. The agreements extend an existing relationship with BBWind and begin a new partnership with Greenvolt Power in the German market. The projects will use turbines manufactured in Germany, tying the company’s footprint to local energy transition goals. For you as an investor, these contracts show how GE Vernova is positioning itself as a key equipment provider in Germany’s onshore wind...

headline: OpenAI-Linked Stocks Slump on Report It Missed Key Targets
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Shares in OpenAI partners such as SoftBank Group Corp. and Oracle Corp. slumped after the Wall Street Journal reported that the artificial intelligence startup recently failed to meet targets for sales and new users, reviving worries about spending ahead of tech earnings. headline: GE Vernova : to deliver pumped-storage technology for India’s 1.35 GW Upper Sileru hydropower plant
summary: GE Vernova® secured an order from Megha Engineering & Infrastructures Limited to deliver nine 150 megawatts pumped-storage units for the 1.35 GW Upper Sileru hydropower plant, in India. ...

headline: Why GE Vernova (GEV) Shares Are Sliding Today
summary: Shares of energy transition company GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) fell 3.2% in the morning session after BNP Paribas downgraded its rating on the stock to Neutral from Outperform, raising concerns about the company's future growth prospects.
